basic_info.about: Anna University is a premier technical university established in 1978. It offers higher education in Engineering, Technology, Architecture, and Applied Sciences. The university consists of four main campuses in Chennai: College of Engineering Guindy (CEG), Alagappa College of Technology (ACT), Madras Institute of Technology (MIT), and School of Architecture and Planning (SAP).
basic_info.summary: Ranked as the #2 State Public University in India by NIRF 2025, Anna University is a central hub for technical education with over 450 affiliated colleges and a strong research focus.

contact_info.address: Sardar Patel Road, Guindy, Chennai - 600 025, Tamil Nadu, India

phd_programs: Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering
departments: Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering
Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
Department of Computer Science and Engineering
sources_verified: Anna University University Departments UG/PG Course Directories (https://cac.annauniv.edu/)
programs.note: This is a summarized list of major programs. For the comprehensive, official list of all specializations, see {Link: Anna University Academic Courses page https://cac.annauniv.edu/}

placements.graduate_outcomes_note: Placement drive for 2024-25 is still ongoing (data as of April 2025). Statistics represent 779 UG and 232 PG students placed so far.

placements.placement_highlights: Anna University has seen a sharp upward trend in its average package, rising from 8.54 LPA in 2022-23 to 10.78 LPA in the current 2024-25 session. While the ongoing 2024-25 drive has already secured 1,011 placements, the university has previously recorded a highest package of 40 LPA in 2023. Core and IT sectors continue to dominate, with companies from Japan and Germany also recruiting directly from the campus.

fees.fees_note: The tuition fee for government-aided UG engineering programs (B.E./B.Tech) is approximately ₹34,500 per year, totaling ₹1.38 Lakhs for the four-year duration. Postgraduate courses like MBA and M.Tech typically range from ₹41,000 to ₹48,330 per year depending on the specific department and specialization. Hostel fees for the 2025-26 session are structured per semester, with first-year total charges including caution deposits reaching approximately ₹97,300 for the first year.

scholarships_detail.name: BC/MBC/DNC Scholarship
scholarships_detail.eligibility: BC/MBC/DNC students with annual family income below ₹2,00,000

scholarships_detail.name: SC/ST/SCA Post-Matric Scholarship
scholarships_detail.eligibility: SC/ST/SCA students with annual family income below ₹2,50,000

scholarships_detail.name: First Graduate Tuition Fee Concession
scholarships_detail.eligibility: Students who are the first in their family to graduate, admitted through TNEA counseling

infrastructure.details: The Main Campus (CEG) extends over 189 acres; Madras Institute of Technology (MIT) covers 52 acres; Taramani campus covers 5 acres.
Includes badminton, basketball, and tennis courts; cricket, football, hockey, and kabaddi grounds; and a swimming pool.
Specialized labs for Civil, Mechanical, Aerospace, and Electrical Engineering, plus unique national facilities like IRS and CGC.
Health centre providing preventive and curative services to students and staff.
High-speed Wi-Fi connectivity in laboratories, libraries, and hostels; features the Distributed Information Centre (DIC) for high-performance computing.

hostel_details.type: Separate for Boys, Girls, and International students (AC options available for International/NRI)

scholarships.name: Postgraduate Scholarship Scheme (CEETA-PG)
scholarships.eligibility: Ranking in CEETA-PG entrance exam and academic merit for ME, MTech, MArch, MPlan students.

scholarships.name: Tamil Nadu e-District Community Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Undergraduate and postgraduate students; family income below Rs 2 lakh (regular) or Rs 2.5 lakh (self-support).

scholarships.name: SC/ST Special Higher Education Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: SC/ST/SCC students staying in university hostels with annual family income below Rs 2.5 lakh.

scholarships.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme
scholarships.eligibility: Girl students admitted in 1st year of Degree program; family income less than Rs 8 lakh per annum.

scholarships.name: Foundation For Excellence (FFE) Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: 1st year UG students; TNEA rank < 6000; >70% in Class X and XII; family income < Rs 3 lakh.

scholarships.name: Quad STEM Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: International students for STEM academic programs for the AY 2025-2026.
